    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T V W Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    AbstractModel - Class in Model
    Base class for models that need to notify observers about state changes.
    AbstractModel() - Constructor for class Model.AbstractModel
    Creates the model with an empty listener list.
    accent - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Accent colour.
    addAttendee(Attendee) - Method in class Model.Event
    Adds a guest to the event.
    addEvent(Event) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Adds a new event unless another event already has the same title.
    addEventForced(Event) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Adds an event without checking for a duplicate title.
    addExceptionDate(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.Event
    Marks a date as an exception, removing a single occurrence from a series.
    addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener) - Method in class Model.AbstractModel
    Registers an observer.
    Attendee - Class in Model
    A guest invited to an event, identified by a name and an optional e-mail.
    Attendee(String, String) - Constructor for class Model.Attendee
    Creates an attendee.

    B

    background - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Window background.
    bind(Controller) - Method in class View.TopPanel
    Binds every button to its controller action.
    buildEvent(int, int, int, int, int, long, String, String, String, String, long, Recurrence, List) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Builds an event from the form data, validating everything.
    button - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Default button background.
    buttonSelected - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Background of a selected/active button.
    buttonText - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Default button text colour.

    C

    CalendarModel - Class in Model
    Holds all of the state the application needs: the event list, the currently displayed date, the active view mode and the dark-mode flag.
    CalendarModel() - Constructor for class Model.CalendarModel
    Creates an empty model positioned at today's date, in month/light mode.
    CalendarMonthPanel - Class in View
    Month view: a grid of the whole month.
    CalendarMonthPanel(Controller) - Constructor for class View.CalendarMonthPanel
    Builds the month view.
    CalendarSubView - Interface in View
    A swappable central view of the calendar (day, week, month or year).
    CalendarView - Class in View
    Main window of the application.
    CalendarView(Controller) - Constructor for class View.CalendarView
    Builds and lays out the main window.
    clearAttendees() - Method in class Model.Event
    Removes every attendee from the event.
    Controller - package Controller
     
    Controller - Class in Controller
    Connects the interface to the model.
    Controller(CalendarModel, EventStorage) - Constructor for class Controller.Controller
    Creates the controller.
    countEventsOn(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Counts how many events occur on the given day (recurrences included).
    createEvent(Event) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Adds a new event.

    D

    DAILY - Enum constant in enum class Model.Recurrence
    The event repeats every day.
    DARK - Static variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Dark theme.
    darkIcon(IconFiles, int, int) - Static method in class View.Icons
    Loads the dark-mode (light-coloured) variant of an icon.
    DatePickerDialog - Class in View
    Small modal calendar used to pick a date with the mouse instead of typing it into spinners.
    DatePickerDialog(Window, LocalDate, boolean) - Constructor for class View.DatePickerDialog
    Opens the picker positioned on a starting date.
    DAY - Enum constant in enum class View.ViewMode
    Shows a single day.
    DayEventsPanel - Class in View
    Side panel that shows the events of the selected day.
    DayEventsPanel(JFrame, Controller) - Constructor for class View.DayEventsPanel
    Builds the side panel.
    DayViewPanel - Class in View
    Day view: an hour-by-hour agenda (00:00 to 23:00) of the model's current view date.
    DayViewPanel(Controller) - Constructor for class View.DayViewPanel
    Builds the day view.
    deleteEvent(Event) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Deletes an event entirely.
    deleteOccurrence(Event, LocalDate) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Deletes only the occurrence on the given day, keeping the rest of the series.

    E

    editOccurrence(Event, LocalDate, Event) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Edits only the occurrence on the given day: it is taken out of the series and turned into a stand-alone event.
    Event - Class in Model
    Represents a single calendar event.
    Event(int, int, int, int, int, long, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Model.Event
    Creates an event with all of its data.
    Event(int, int, int, int, int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Model.Event
    Creates an event without an explicit duration; the duration defaults to one hour.
    EventFormDialog - Class in View
    Form window to create or edit an event.
    EventFormDialog(Frame, Controller, Event, LocalDate) - Constructor for class View.EventFormDialog
    Builds the form.
    EventStorage - Class in Model
    Persists events to (and loads them from) a plain text file.
    EventStorage(String) - Constructor for class Model.EventStorage
    Creates a storage bound to the given file name.
    EventValidationException - Exception Class in Model
    Thrown when the data supplied for an event is invalid.
    EventValidationException(String) - Constructor for exception class Model.EventValidationException
    Creates the exception with a user-facing message.

    F

    firePropertyChange(String, Object, Object) - Method in class Model.AbstractModel
    Notifies the observers that a property changed.

    getCurrentMode() - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    getCurrentViewDate() - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    getDarkMode() - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    getDate() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getDescription() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getDuration() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getEditButton() - Method in class View.TopPanel
     
    getEmail() - Method in class Model.Attendee
     
    getEndOfEvent() - Method in class Model.Event
    Computes the moment the event ends, from its start plus its duration.
    getEventByTitle(String) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Looks up an event by its title (case-insensitive).
    getEventSelected() - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    getEventsOn(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Returns every event that happens on the given day (recurrences included), sorted chronologically.
    getExceptionDates() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getLocation() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getModel() - Method in class Controller.Controller
     
    getName() - Method in class Model.Attendee
     
    getPickedDate() - Method in class View.DatePickerDialog
     
    getRecurrence() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getReminderLeadMinutes() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getResult() - Method in class View.EventFormDialog
     
    getSearchBar() - Method in class View.TopPanel
     
    getTime() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getTitle() - Method in class Model.Event
     
    getViewMode() - Method in enum class View.ViewMode
     
    goNext() - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Moves the view one step forward, by an amount that depends on the view mode.
    goPrevious() - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Moves the view one step back, by an amount that depends on the view mode.
    goToday() - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Jumps the view to today's date.
    gridLine - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Colour of grid and border lines.

    H

    hasEvents - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Highlight colour for days that have events.
    hasEventsOn(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Tells whether any event occurs on the given day.

    I

    Icons - Class in View
    Helper that loads and scales the application icons, picking the colour variant that matches the active theme.
    Icons() - Constructor for class View.Icons
     
    isRecurring() - Method in class Model.Event
     

    L

    LIGHT - Static variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Light theme.
    lightIcon(IconFiles, int, int) - Static method in class View.Icons
    Loads the light-mode (dark-coloured) variant of an icon.
    load() - Method in class Model.EventStorage
    Reads the events from the file.
    loadEvents(List) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Replaces the whole event list (used when loading from disk).
    loadFromDisk() - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Loads the events from disk into the model.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main.Main
    Starts the Java Event Planner.
    Main - package Main
     
    Main - Class in Main
    Application entry point.
    Main() - Constructor for class Main.Main
     
    Model - package Model
     
    MONTH - Enum constant in enum class View.ViewMode
    Shows one month.
    MONTHLY - Enum constant in enum class Model.Recurrence
    The event repeats on the same day-of-month every month.

    N

    nextDay(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    nextMonth(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    nextWeek(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    nextYear(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
     
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class Model.Recurrence
    The event happens only once.

    O

    occurrenceStart(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.Event
    Exact moment (date + time) at which the occurrence on the given day starts.
    occursOn(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.Event
    Tells whether the event takes place on the given day, taking the recurrence rule and the exception dates into account.
    of(boolean) - Static method in class View.ThemeColors
    Returns the palette for the requested theme.
    openCreate() - Method in class View.DayEventsPanel
    Opens the form to create a new event on the selected day.
    openEdit() - Method in class View.DayEventsPanel
    Opens the form to edit the selected event.

    P

    panel - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Background of panels and input fields.
    propertyChange(PropertyChangeEvent) - Method in class View.CalendarView
    Reacts to relevant model changes by redrawing the panels.
    propertyChangeSupport - Variable in class Model.AbstractModel
    Delegate that keeps the registered listeners and dispatches events.

    R

    Recurrence - Enum Class in Model
    Repetition rule that an event may follow.
    refresh() - Method in class View.CalendarMonthPanel
    Rebuilds the header and the day grid from the current model state.
    refresh() - Method in interface View.CalendarSubView
    Rebuilds the view from the current model state (data and theme).
    refresh() - Method in class View.DayEventsPanel
    Reloads the day's events and reapplies the theme.
    refresh() - Method in class View.DayViewPanel
    Rebuilds the 24 hour rows for the current day.
    refresh() - Method in class View.TopPanel
    Refreshes the central label and the colours as the model state changes.
    refresh() - Method in class View.WeekViewPanel
    Rebuilds the seven day columns from the current model state.
    refresh() - Method in class View.YearViewPanel
    Rebuilds the twelve mini-months from the current model state.
    ReminderService - Class in View
    Runs on a separate daemon thread and periodically checks whether any event is approaching its reminder time.
    ReminderService(CalendarModel) - Constructor for class View.ReminderService
    Creates the service for the given model.
    removeEvent(Event) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Removes an event from the list.
    removeOccurrence(Event, LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Removes a single occurrence of a recurring event, keeping the rest of the series.
    removePropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener) - Method in class Model.AbstractModel
    Removes a previously registered observer.
    replaceEvent(Event, Event) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Replaces an event with an edited version.
    run() - Method in class View.ReminderService
    Main loop: check the reminders, then sleep.

    S

    save(List) - Method in class Model.EventStorage
    Writes every event to the file, one per line.
    search(String) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Searches the events for a keyword.
    searchEvents(String) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Searches every event for a keyword in its title, description, location or category.
    selectDate(LocalDate) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Selects a day and clears the current event selection.
    selected - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Highlight colour for the selected day.
    setCategory(String) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the event category.
    setDarkMode(boolean) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Switches between the light and dark themes.
    setDarkMode(boolean) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Sets the dark-mode flag and notifies observers.
    setDate(int, int, int) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the event date.
    setDescription(String) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the event description.
    setDurationInHours(long, long) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the duration from hours and minutes.
    setDurationInMinutes(long) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the duration in minutes.
    setEventSelected(Event) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Sets the currently selected event and notifies observers.
    setLocation(String) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the event location.
    setRecurrence(Recurrence) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the recurrence rule.
    setReminderLeadMinutes(long) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the reminder lead time.
    setTime(int, int) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the event time.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class Model.Event
    Sets the event title (trimmed).
    setViewDate(LocalDate) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Sets the date the view should display and notifies observers.
    setViewMode(ViewMode) - Method in class Controller.Controller
    Changes the active view mode.
    setViewMode(ViewMode) - Method in class Model.CalendarModel
    Sets the active view mode and notifies observers.
    start() - Method in class View.ReminderService
    Starts the background thread.
    StorageException - Exception Class in Model
    Signals a problem while reading or saving the events file.
    StorageException(String) - Constructor for exception class Model.StorageException
    Creates the exception with a user-facing message.
    styleButton(AbstractButton, boolean) - Method in class View.ThemeColors
    Applies the current theme to a button (or toggle), forcing it to be fully painted with the theme colour even under the default (Metal) Look and Feel.
    subtleText - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Secondary, lower-contrast text colour.

    T

    text - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Primary text colour.
    ThemeColors - Class in View
    Colour palette used by the interface.
    themed(IconFiles, boolean, int, int) - Static method in class View.Icons
    Returns the theme-appropriate variant of an icon: the dark-mode (light-coloured) icon when dark is true, otherwise the light-mode (dark-coloured) one.
    today - Variable in class View.ThemeColors
    Highlight colour for today's cell.
    TopPanel - Class in View
    Top bar holding the view-mode toggles, the navigation arrows, the date label, the search field, the theme switch and the create/edit buttons.
    TopPanel() - Constructor for class View.TopPanel
    Builds the top bar and its components.
    toString() - Method in class Model.Attendee
     
    toString() - Method in enum class Model.Recurrence
     
    toString() - Method in enum class View.ViewMode
     

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class Model.Recurrence
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class View.ViewMode
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class Model.Recurrence
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    values() - Static method in enum class View.ViewMode
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    View - package View
     
    ViewMode - Enum Class in View
    The granularity of the central calendar view.

    W

    WEEK - Enum constant in enum class View.ViewMode
    Shows one week.
    WEEKLY - Enum constant in enum class Model.Recurrence
    The event repeats on the same weekday every week.
    WeekViewPanel - Class in View
    Week view: seven columns (Sunday to Saturday) for the week that contains the model's current view date.
    WeekViewPanel(Controller) - Constructor for class View.WeekViewPanel
    Builds the week view.

    Y

    YEAR - Enum constant in enum class View.ViewMode
    Shows the twelve months of a year.
    YearViewPanel - Class in View
    Year view: the twelve months of the model's current year shown as small grids.
    YearViewPanel(Controller) - Constructor for class View.YearViewPanel
    Builds the year view.
